installCommand: python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
buildCommand: if [ "$(git rev-parse --is-shallow-repository)" = "true" ]; then git fetch --unshallow --tags --force origin +refs/heads/main:refs/remotes/origin/main; else git fetch --tags --force origin +refs/heads/main:refs/remotes/origin/main; fi; rm -rf site && .venv/bin/python -m mkdocs build
